arts.ttl: Man City new midfielder Gonzalez injured on debut ahead of Real Madrid match
arts.sum: New Manchester City signing Nico Gonzalez was injured and substituted after 22 minutes of his debut for the Premier League club on Saturday. His injury will be a concern for City manager Pep Guardiola ahead of Tuesday’s Champions League playoff against Real Madrid.
